name: setup-wdk7-action
description: GitHub Action to detect, download, cache, and expose Windows Driver Kit 7.1.

scripts.package: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire as __tinysecCreateRequire } from 'node:module';const require = __tinysecCreateRequire(import.meta.url);" && node scripts/trim-dist.cjs dist/index.js
scripts.build: npm run check && npm run package
